# hush_salesforce_access_privilege (Resource)

Manage Salesforce access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Salesforce access privilege with API and refresh token scopes
resource "hush_salesforce_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "my-salesforce-privilege"
  description = "API access with refresh token"
  run_as_user = "admin@myorg.salesforce.com"
  scopes      = ["Api", "RefreshToken"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Salesforce access privilege
- `run_as_user` (String) The Salesforce user to impersonate (email address)
- `scopes` (List of String) The list of Salesforce OAuth2 scopes

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Salesforce access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Salesforce access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege
